findings.message: XMP metadata carries no grain-direction key; downstream press / finishing operations may not get the substrate orientation from this PDF
Trapped key is missing in XMP metadata
/Catalog /ViewerPreferences dictionary is missing — add it with /DisplayDocTitle true so readers show the document title rather than the filename
No GWG audit-trail namespace found in XMP metadata; the PDF has not been through a GWG-aware preflight
Inadequate bleed on page 1: left 0.0pt, right 0.0pt, bottom 0.0pt, top 0.0pt (minimum 8.5pt / 3.0mm)
Page 1 has no content stream (empty page)
Page 1 has no explicit TrimBox; the engine defaulted it to the MediaBox. Production workflows expect an explicit TrimBox so the press knows the final cut size, distinct from any bleed area.
